bibliographic_info.title: Clock systematic jump estimation and URA refinement of BDS-3 B2b real-time precise point positioning service

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  GPS Solutions (2025) 29:73 https://doi.org/10.1007/s10291-025-01835-7 RESEARCH Clock systematic jump estimation and URA refinement of BDS‑3 B2b real‑time precise point positioning service Junping Chen1,2 · Ziyuan Song1,3 · Yize Zhang1,2 · Junsheng Ding4 · Xin Jiang3 · Sainan Yang3 · Yangfei Hou3 Received: 5 November 2024 / Accepted: 17 February 2025 / Published online: 4 March 20
During the use of PPP-B2b, we identified two issues adversely affecting positioning performance: systematic jumps in GPS clock bias and inaccuracies of the URA parameter.

(2021) assessed BDS-3 PPP-B2b RTS com- user range error index (URAI), clock offset correction and dif- pared to CNES RTS and demonstrated the comparability of the ferential code bias (DCB) correction.
